title: fix(deps): update module github.com/crc-org/crc/v2 to v2.47.0 - autoclosed
body:

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>crc-org/crc (github.com/crc-org/crc/v2)</summary>

### [`v2.47.0`](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/crc/releases/tag/v2.47.0): 2.47.0-4.17.14

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/crc/compare/v2.46.0...v2.47.0)

Downloads are available at: https://developers.redhat.com/content-gateway/rest/mirror/pub/openshift-v4/clients/crc/2.47.0
To use these binaries follow the instructions at https://console.redhat.com/openshift/create/local to obtain the needed pull-secret.

***

## Notable Changes

-   OpenShift 4.17.14
-   MicroShift 4.17.14
-   OKD 4.15.0-0.okd-2024-02-23-163410
-   Changed Linux default network-mode to user [#​4514](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/crc/issues/4514)
-   Fixed incorrect data shown on running `crc status` command [#​4603](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/crc/issues/4603)
-   Refine error message for clarity when daemon already started [#​4602](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/crc/issues/4602)
-   Adds support for generating manpages for crc cli commands [#​4586](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/crc/issues/4586)
-   Show error for `crc console` command when 'microshift' preset is used [#​4576](https://redirect.github.com/crc-org/crc/issues/4576)
